reddit_subreddits.name: ediscovery
reddit_subreddits.context: Primary hunting ground. Attorneys and lit support professionals discussing costs, tools, workflow pain. Anyone asking about alternatives or complaining about Relativity/DISCO/Nuix pricing is a potential RaaS lead.

reddit_subreddits.name: lawyers
reddit_subreddits.context: General attorney discussion. Private subreddit — requires Reddit API auth. Watch for document management pain, case file overwhelm, tech stack discussions.

reddit_subreddits.name: lawfirm
reddit_subreddits.context: Small/mid firm operations. These firms are the RaaS sweet spot — too small for enterprise eDiscovery platforms, big enough to have document-heavy cases.

reddit_subreddits.name: LawEnforcement
reddit_subreddits.context: Evidence processing, digital forensics tool discussions. Private subreddit — requires Reddit API auth. On-premise deployment is the key selling point for LE.

reddit_subreddits.name: AskLE
reddit_subreddits.context: Public Q&A with law enforcement. Evidence processing discussions, tool recommendations, workflow pain. Accessible alternative while r/LawEnforcement requires auth.

reddit_subreddits.name: digitalforensics
reddit_subreddits.context: Tool recommendations, workflow challenges. Cellebrite/Magnet users who also deal with document evidence. Adjacent to our core but strong overlap.

reddit_subreddits.name: cybersecurity
reddit_subreddits.context: Investigation tools, incident response document management. Cross-vertical. Lower signal-to-noise ratio — scan less frequently.

reddit_subreddits.name: InsuranceProfessional
reddit_subreddits.context: Claims investigation, fraud detection, SIU workflows. Document-heavy fraud cases are RaaS targets.

reddit_subreddits.name: cryptocurrency
reddit_subreddits.context: Compliance discussions, investigation tools. High noise — filter aggressively for compliance/investigation content, ignore price/trading talk.

reddit_subreddits.name: compliance
reddit_subreddits.context: AML, regulatory document management. Cross-vertical but strong signal for crypto compliance and corporate investigation teams.

reddit_subreddits.name: whitecollar
reddit_subreddits.context: Investigation workflow, document review. White-collar defense attorneys are primary RaaS targets.

reddit_subreddits.name: CFE
reddit_subreddits.context: Certified fraud examiners. Independent practitioners handling document-heavy fraud cases. Similar profile to small law firms for RaaS.

brave_web_topics.name: Reddit eDiscovery Pain Signals
brave_web_topics.query: site:reddit.com "document review" frustrated OR expensive OR slow OR alternative OR "looking for" 2026
brave_web_topics.context: Reddit pain signals about document review that our subreddit fetch might miss — different subs, cross-posts, older posts with new comments.

brave_web_topics.name: Reddit People Shopping for Tools
brave_web_topics.query: site:reddit.com "need a tool" OR "looking for software" OR "any recommendations" investigation OR litigation OR documents OR ediscovery
brave_web_topics.context: People actively asking for tool recommendations. Highest-value signal — these are buyers.

brave_web_topics.name: eDiscovery Switching Signals
brave_web_topics.query: ediscovery "too expensive" OR "can't afford" OR "looking for alternative" OR "switching from" OR "replacing"
brave_web_topics.context: People expressing intent to switch tools. Direct competitor displacement opportunities.

brave_web_topics.name: Small Firm Document Overwhelm
brave_web_topics.query: "document review" "small firm" OR "solo" OR "boutique" overwhelmed OR drowning OR backlog OR "too many documents"
brave_web_topics.context: Small/mid firms drowning in documents — ideal RaaS prospects who can't afford enterprise eDiscovery.

brave_web_topics.name: Relativity Frustration & Switching
brave_web_topics.query: Relativity ediscovery "switching" OR "leaving" OR "frustrated" OR "pricing increase" OR "too expensive" OR "forced to migrate"
brave_web_topics.context: Relativity users unhappy with pricing, RelOne forced migration, or feature removal. Post-IPO this will likely increase.

brave_web_topics.name: Relativity Community Forum Pain
brave_web_topics.query: site:community.relativity.com frustrated OR slow OR expensive OR problem OR issue OR alternative
brave_web_topics.context: Relativity's own community forum — users posting about problems, frustrations, or looking for workarounds.

brave_web_topics.name: Nuix Community Forum Pain
brave_web_topics.query: site:community.nuix.com frustrated OR slow OR expensive OR problem OR issue OR alternative
brave_web_topics.context: Nuix's community forum — users posting about problems or frustrations.

brave_web_topics.name: Competitor Dissatisfaction (Broad)
brave_web_topics.query: "Relativity alternative" OR "Nuix alternative" OR "DISCO alternative" OR "Palantir alternative" investigation OR ediscovery
brave_web_topics.context: People explicitly searching for alternatives to incumbent platforms.

brave_web_topics.name: LE Evidence & Digital Forensics Tools
brave_web_topics.query: law enforcement evidence management digital forensics tool software
brave_web_topics.context: News about LE evidence processing tools, backlogs, procurement.

brave_web_topics.name: Insurance SIU & Fraud Investigation
brave_web_topics.query: insurance fraud investigation SIU document review claims investigation tools
brave_web_topics.context: SIU team tooling, fraud ring investigations, document-heavy claims.

brave_web_topics.name: Crypto Compliance Document Pain
brave_web_topics.query: cryptocurrency compliance investigation documents SAR filing off-chain evidence
brave_web_topics.context: Compliance teams struggling with document volumes alongside blockchain tracing.

brave_web_topics.name: Corporate Internal Investigations
brave_web_topics.query: corporate internal investigation document review HR investigation whistleblower compliance
brave_web_topics.context: Corporate investigation teams dealing with cross-departmental document review.
